name: David Martinez
alt_names: デイビッド・マルティネズ
description:
David is a street kid from Arroyo, Santo Domingo in Night City, who is enrolled into Arasaka's educational system at Arasaka Academy. He lives with his mother Gloria in an apartment of Megabuilding H4.

After experiencing a personal tragedy, David has the powerful Sandevistan speedware installed in his body and becomes one of Night City's edgerunners. He also becomes acquainted with [Lucy](https://anilist.co/character/284157/Lucy), who leads him into the city's criminal underworld, and chooses to join the gang of edgerunners she is a part of, led by [Maine](https://anilist.co/character/284159/Maine).
